scripts.dev: concurrently --names "USERS,EXAMS,ATTEMPTS,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix server/Users" "npm run dev --prefix server/Exams" "npm run dev --prefix server/ExamsAttempts" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:hot: concurrently --names "USERS,EXAMS,ATTEMPTS,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:hot --prefix server/Users" "npm run dev:hot --prefix server/Exams" "npm run dev:hot --prefix server/ExamsAttempts" "npm run dev --prefix client"
